projectDescription: High-quality single-file implementations of deep reinforcement learning algorithms (PPO, DQN, SAC, TD3, DDPG, C51, PPG) with research-friendly features like Tensorboard logging, W&B integration, and cloud scaling.
keyFeatures: Single-file algorithm implementations — every variant is fully self-contained in one Python file
Benchmarked across 7+ algorithms and 34+ environments with reproducible results
Tensorboard and Weights & Biases integration for experiment tracking
Hugging Face Model Hub integration for saving and loading trained models
Seeded reproducibility for deterministic experiment results
Cloud scaling with AWS Batch and Docker support
Hyperparameter tuning via Optuna-based Tuner utility
Slurm cluster support for high-performance computing environments
JAX-accelerated variants for several algorithms (DQN, C51, DDPG, TD3, PPO)
publicApiSurface: cleanrl/ppo.py — PPO for classic control (CartPole, etc.)
cleanrl/ppo_atari.py — PPO for Atari games with CNN preprocessing
cleanrl/ppo_continuous_action.py — PPO for continuous action spaces (MuJoCo)
cleanrl/ppo_atari_lstm.py — PPO with LSTM for Atari
cleanrl/ppo_atari_envpool.py — PPO with EnvPool vectorized environments
cleanrl/ppo_atari_envpool_xla_jax.py — PPO with JAX and XLA acceleration
cleanrl/dqn.py — Deep Q-Learning for classic control
cleanrl/dqn_atari.py — DQN for Atari games
cleanrl/dqn_jax.py — DQN with JAX
cleanrl/c51.py — Categorical DQN (C51) for classic control
cleanrl/c51_atari.py — C51 for Atari games
cleanrl/sac_continuous_action.py — Soft Actor-Critic for continuous actions
cleanrl/sac_atari.py — SAC for Atari
cleanrl/ddpg_continuous_action.py — Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient
cleanrl/td3_continuous_action.py — Twin Delayed DDPG
cleanrl/ppg_procgen.py — Phasic Policy Gradient for ProcGen
cleanrl/ppo_rnd_envpool.py — PPO with Random Network Distillation
cleanrl/qdagger_dqn_atari_impalacnn.py — Qdagger imitation learning
cleanrl_utils.tuner.Tuner — Hyperparameter tuning utility
cleanrl_utils.benchmark — Benchmark scheduling utility
python -m cleanrl_utils.enjoy — Load and run models from HuggingFace Hub
